intent.summary: From a primary credit (歌手/作曲家/指挥家/乐队/演奏家) + an album name, run deep multi-pass research and strong reasoning, then produce ONE extremely-high-quality long-form Chinese album review (乐评) of 10,000–15,000 中文字符 covering every dimension related to the music, with every factual claim grounded and separated from interpretation.
in_scope: Reviewing exactly one music album across any genre/idiom — classical (work + composer + conductor/orchestra/soloist + performance practice + reference-recording comparison), jazz, pop/rock, electronic, hip-hop, folk, soundtrack/score, world
Genre-adaptive critical lens chosen by runtime judgment from rich per-album descriptors, not a fixed template

Deep research/资料搜集 on the artist, genesis, recording, the music itself (track-by-track / movement-by-movement), production/arrangement/sound, historical/cultural/critical context, comparisons, and a reasoned verdict
Honest degradation for obscure albums with thin public information
Adapting the unit of analysis when the input is a single / EP / box set rather than a standard LP
out_of_scope: Pure lyric translation with no critical content
Short summaries or capsule reviews (the floor is 10,000 中文字符)
intent.primary_user: agent invoked by a human who supplies a primary credit + album name and wants a single comprehensive 乐评; speed is explicitly not a concern, quality is the only bar
triggers_observed: 给 <艺术家/作曲家/指挥家> 的专辑 <名称> 写一篇深度乐评

altitude_rationale: Draft stub with real ambition (multi-genre, deep research, 极高质量, 超高长度) and a real harm surface (fabricated discographic facts); wide surface across research + genre-adaptive writing + deterministic length/coverage validation warrants full rigor.

scorecard.evidence: SKILL.md captures intent, hard constraints, and rough scope, but frontmatter description lacks explicit Use-when/Do-NOT trigger lines (score_skill: description_has_use_when=false, description_has_donot=false, mentions_triggers=false) and there is no executable protocol/runbook or modules table yet.
gaps: No testable trigger with positive/negative/adjacent examples (e.g. album-review vs hifi-review vs lyric-translation)
No execution protocol (preflight->research->reason->write->validate->report)
Genre-adaptation and length/quality controls live only as prose intent, not externalized

scorecard.evidence: The skill is fundamentally fact-dependent (discography, personnel, dates, reception) yet has no source roster, fan-out/depth plan, reliability grading, triangulation, or claim->evidence map. Stub only states 'never fabricate' as an aspiration.
gaps: No music-source roster (e.g. label/liner notes, MusicBrainz/Discogs-class metadata, AllMusic/Pitchfork/Gramophone/豆瓣音乐/critic press, interviews) with type/orientation/reliability profiles
No breadth (fan-out across artist/genesis/musicology/reception angles) + depth (iterative deepening) plan
No claim->evidence traceability mapping every discographic fact to a source id
No honest-degradation protocol for thin-information (obscure) albums

scorecard.evidence: score_skill: evals/ and tests/ absent; no fixtures, no graders, no trajectory assertions. SKILL.md mentions evidence/quality but ships no test asset.
gaps: No deterministic output validator (中文字符 length window + section-coverage linter + claim->evidence gate)
No fixture review documents (good / under-floor / over-ceiling / untraced-fact / obscure-degraded / classical) to assert on
No regression / adjacent-false-trigger battery

scorecard.evidence: No .skill-engineer/red red log, no failing-case-first artifacts; nothing built yet. Kept scored (not N/A) per altitude rule: forcing red-first before the engineer builds is the point.
gaps: No failing eval cases written before the writing/validation behavior
No contract on the review's structured backing (claims, evidence ids) or on the validator's exit semantics

scorecard.evidence: No success definition, activation precision, cost-per-success, or length-conformance rate defined. score_skill: mentions_metrics=false.
gaps: No length-window conformance rate (% of runs inside 10,000–15,000 中文字符)
No fabrication/ungrounded-claim rate metric
No section-coverage pass rate; no activation precision vs adjacent skills

scorecard.evidence: SKILL.md is short (62 lines) but that thinness is because it is an unbuilt stub, not because it is well-factored: there are no rules/ references/ assets/ modules to progressively disclose into, and no Modules table (score_skill: body_has_modules_table=false, all subdirs absent).
gaps: No progressive-disclosure split (research protocol, genre lenses, output template, validators) into rules/ + references/ + assets/
No Modules/Scripts table; SKILL.md must stay a thin orchestrator once the body is written

scorecard.evidence: No version/changelog, release gate, rollback, or deprecation metadata in the stub.
gaps: No version + CHANGELOG
No release gate tying ship to validator + eval pass
No rollback/deprecation note

overall_readiness.summary: A captured-intent draft stub: clear scope and hard constraints, but every build pillar (research, testing, tdd, metrics, lifecycle) is absent and design/low-context are only partial. This is a from-scratch build; the value is the recommended design below, which mirrors the proven vince-hifi-review pattern (source-traceable evidence + deterministic long-form validator) adapted to music criticism.

comparables.what_to_borrow: The whole industrial shape for a source-traceable long-form evaluation skill: an N-step protocol that branches on a runtime-judged class; a strict claim->evidence traceability gate (validate_output.py: every claim must carry source_ids that exist in evidence, provenance-typed measured|consensus|prior); and especially check_longform.py — a deterministic long-form QA script that counts CJK 字 against a [min,max] window AND lints required sections, exiting non-zero on any violation. Adapt this validator directly: 中文字符 window 10000–15000 + genre-adaptive required-section coverage + claim->source gate. Borrow the structure (thin SKILL orchestrator + rules/ modules + scripts/ validators + evals/ fixtures with run_all + schema_check), not the audio content.

Canonical SKILL.md frontmatter and Use-when / Do-NOT trigger phrasing for clean self-selection, and how scripts/references/assets subdirs co-package a self-contained skill — used to harden the currently trigger-less stub description and to lay out progressive disclosure.

recommended_design.trigger: Frontmatter description must state Use-when (a primary music credit + album name supplied, user wants a deep/comprehensive 乐评) and Do-NOT (gear evaluation -> vince-hifi-review; buying/price advice; bare lyric translation; non-music). Include positive cases (pop LP, classical work-vs-performance, jazz, soundtrack), a negative case ("这条耳机声音怎么样" -> vince-hifi-review), and adjacent false-trigger cases ("帮我翻译这张专辑的歌词" -> not this skill; "推荐几张类似的专辑买" -> out of scope).
recommended_design.protocol: Preflight: confirm one album + primary credit; classify the album with rich runtime descriptors (idiom/era/role-of-credit/work-vs-performance/release-form single|EP|LP|box) instead of a rigid genre enum; set the unit of analysis (track vs movement vs disc). Steps: (1) build a source roster for this album; (2) breadth fan-out across angles [artist/genesis, recording/production, the music itself, reception/criticism, comparisons, cultural-historical context] then depth-deepen the thin angles; (3) clean + grade + triangulate facts, mapping each discographic fact to a source id and flagging anything ungrounded; (4) strong multi-pass reasoning to form the critical thesis and per-section judgments; (5) write the 乐评 from the genre-adapted long-form template, 10,000–15,000 中文字符, claims tagged grounded vs interpretation; (6) self-verify with the deterministic validator and never ship a FAIL. Report: the review + an evidence appendix.
resources: rules/research-protocol.md — source roster classes for music, breadth/depth fan-out plan, reliability grading, triangulation, honest-degradation rule for obscure albums

rules/genre-lenses.md — rich per-idiom descriptors and which critical dimensions to foreground (classical: work vs performance, performance practice, reference-recording comparison; jazz: improvisation/interplay/take history; pop/rock: songcraft/production/era; electronic: sound-design/texture; soundtrack: function-to-image) chosen by runtime judgment, NOT a fixed bucket
rules/output-template.md — the required long-form section skeleton (开篇定位 / 艺术家与背景 / 创作与录制源起 / 逐曲或逐乐章分析 / 制作编曲与声音 / 历史文化与批评语境 / 横向比较与参考录音 / 总评与适配 / 证据附录) with genre-adaptive substitutions
references/source-roster.md — concrete music source classes with type/orientation/reliability profiles (liner notes/label, metadata DBs, critic press EN+中文, interviews, academic musicology)
assets/review-template.md — fillable长文骨架 the writer renders into
assets/backing.schema.json — JSON contract for the structured backing (claims[] with source_ids + grounded|interpretation tag; evidence[] with source_id + reliability)
recommended_design.evidence_base: Required (this skill makes heavy external factual claims). Build a music-domain source roster (liner notes/label credits, MusicBrainz/Discogs-class metadata, AllMusic/Pitchfork/RYM/Gramophone/JazzTimes/豆瓣音乐 critic press, artist interviews, academic musicology) each profiled by type/orientation/reliability. Every discographic fact (track list, personnel, recording dates/venue, label, release form) must map to a source id in the backing JSON; interpretation must be tagged separately from fact; thin-information albums degrade honestly ('公开资料有限' instead of invented detail).
controls: Length window 10,000–15,000 中文字符 enforced by a deterministic validator, not prose — ship is blocked on FAIL
No-fabrication gate: every fact-class claim must carry a source_id present in evidence; ungrounded discographic facts fail the validator
Read-only research; no purchase/transaction or price advice in output
Genre-mismatch guard: the lens is selected by runtime judgment so a pop template is never forced onto a symphony (and vice versa)
Honest-degradation control: obscure/thin albums emit explicit '资料不足' rather than hallucinated specifics
tests: validator unit: a fixture review at 12,000 中文字符 with full section coverage and all claims traced -> PASS (exit 0)
validator unit: a 6,000-字 review -> FAIL on under-floor; a 17,000-字 review -> FAIL on over-ceiling (boundary cases at 9,999 and 15,001)
validator unit: a review missing the 证据附录 / a required section -> FAIL on section coverage
validator unit: a review asserting a track list / personnel / recording date with no backing source_id -> FAIL on untraced fact
fixture: classical album (composer+conductor+orchestra+soloist) review asserts work-vs-performance separation and a reference-recording comparison section exist
fixture: obscure thin-info album review contains explicit '资料不足/公开资料有限' and NO fabricated specifics -> PASS
behavioral negative: '客观评价这条耳机' must NOT activate this skill (routes to vince-hifi-review); 'translate these lyrics' must NOT activate
contract: backing.schema.json validates a good backing JSON and rejects one whose claim references a non-existent evidence id
metrics: length-window conformance rate: % of runs landing inside 10,000–15,000 中文字符 (target high, e.g. >=0.9)
ungrounded-claim rate: count of fact-class claims with no valid source_id per review (target 0)
section-coverage pass rate: % of reviews passing the genre-adapted required-section linter
activation precision vs adjacent skills (album-review vs hifi-review vs lyric-translation) on a small labeled trigger set
recommended_design.lifecycle: Add a version + CHANGELOG; release gate = validator green (length + coverage + traceability) AND the eval battery green; record a rollback note (revert to prior SKILL.md) and a deprecation pointer. Keep an evidence-gated update rule: roster/template changes require a re-run of the eval fixtures.
adversarial_checklist: review body at 9,999 中文字符 (one under floor) → validator FAILs on under-length (exit non-zero), not a rounding pass
review body at 15,001 中文字符 (one over ceiling) → validator FAILs on over-length; a 12,000-字 in-window review PASSes
track list / personnel / recording date asserted with no backing source_id → flagged as ungrounded and FAILs the traceability gate (must never be silently emitted as fact)
fabricated discographic fact (e.g. invented guest musician or wrong label) present in backing → claim whose source_id is absent from evidence[] → validator FAILs (green-but-wrong is caught)

classical album: composer (work) vs conductor/orchestra/soloist (performance) → review separates the WORK from the PERFORMANCE and includes a reference-recording comparison section, scored with the same rigor as a pop album

obscure album with thin public information → review degrades honestly with explicit '资料不足/公开资料有限' and contains NO invented track/personnel/date specifics (must not hallucinate to hit the length floor)
genre mismatch: a symphony fed to the pipeline → lens selected by runtime judgment, the pop/songcraft template is NOT forced (and a pop LP does not get a 'movements/乐章' template)

non-standard release form: a single / EP / box set rather than a standard LP → unit of analysis adapts (per-track vs per-disc) and the length/coverage targets still apply or degrade with a stated reason, not a crash

CJK length counting hazard: a review padded with Latin text, digits, and punctuation but few 汉字 → 中文字符 count uses CJK-only counting so padding cannot fake the floor (count reflects actual 汉字, e.g. [一-鿿])
adjacent-skill input: '客观评价这条耳机 / 这个DAC推得动吗' → this skill does NOT activate (routes to vince-hifi-review); 'translate these lyrics' / 'recommend albums to buy' → out of scope, no review produced

prioritized_actions.action: Build the music-domain evidence base: a profiled source roster (liner notes/label, metadata DBs, EN+中文 critic press, interviews, musicology) + a breadth-fan-out/depth-deepen plan + a claim->evidence map where every discographic fact carries a source id, plus an honest-degradation rule for thin-info albums.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Required pillar at full altitude scoring 0 caps the verdict at draft; fabrication of discographic facts is the skill's primary harm and the research protocol is what prevents it.

prioritized_actions.action: Author a deterministic output validator script (adapt vince-hifi-review's check_longform.py): count 中文字符 against the 10,000–15,000 window, lint genre-adapted required-section coverage, and gate claim->source traceability via a backing JSON; exit non-zero on any violation. Add fixtures: good / under-floor / over-ceiling / untraced-fact / obscure-degraded / classical.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Required pillar scoring 0; this validator is what makes the build test-driven and able to reach industrial, and it enforces the hard length + no-fabrication constraints mechanically.

prioritized_actions.action: Write the validator and adjacent-trigger eval cases RED first (assertion-level failures against an importable stub, captured in .skill-engineer/red/red.log) before implementing the writing/validation behavior; put a contract on the backing JSON (claims/evidence ids) and the validator exit semantics.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Required pillar at full altitude; red-first is the whole point for a from-scratch stub and prevents happy-path-only shipping.

prioritized_actions.action: Rewrite the frontmatter description with explicit Use-when + Do-NOT trigger lines (positive: pop/classical/jazz/soundtrack; negative: gear eval; adjacent: lyric translation, buying advice) and write the executable protocol runbook (preflight->classify->research->reason->write->validate->report) plus genre-adaptive controls as externalized rules, not prose.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Design is required and currently only partial; without a testable trigger and a runbook the engineer has no executable contract and activation precision cannot be measured.

prioritized_actions.action: Split the design into a thin SKILL.md orchestrator with a Modules/Scripts table plus rules/ (research-protocol, genre-lenses, output-template), references/ (source-roster), assets/ (review-template, backing.schema.json), scripts/ (validator), evals/ (fixtures + run_all + schema_check) — load on demand.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Required pillar currently partial-but-vacuous (thin because empty); progressive disclosure keeps SKILL.md small once the substantial research/template content is added.

prioritized_actions.action: Define and instrument: length-window conformance rate, ungrounded-claim rate (target 0), section-coverage pass rate, and activation precision vs adjacent skills; record them in a metric plan.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Required pillar at full altitude scoring 0; without measurable success the quality bar ('质量必须极高') is unfalsifiable. Does not by itself cap once a plan exists, but is strongly recommended.

prioritized_actions.action: Add a version + CHANGELOG and a release gate (ship only when validator + eval battery are green), with a rollback note and an evidence-gated update rule for roster/template changes.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Expected at full altitude; ship-and-forget is acceptable risk only short-term. Polish once core build + tests land.

blocking_unknowns: 中文字符 counting definition to enforce: strictly CJK 汉字 (e.g. regex [一-鿿] as in vince-hifi-review/check_longform.py) vs total characters including Latin/punctuation. Recommendation: CJK-汉字-only so Latin/digit padding cannot game the floor; engineer must lock this in the validator and state it in SKILL.md.

Whether the review must be backed by a structured JSON (claims+evidence) emitted alongside the prose to make the traceability gate machine-checkable, or whether traceability is enforced only via an in-prose 证据附录. Recommendation: emit a backing JSON (as vince-hifi-review does) so validate_output-style gating is deterministic.

Live research access at build/run time: can the engineer assume web/search tools are available for the fan-out, or must the skill be authored to operate on caller-provided source material when offline? This changes how the research protocol and fixtures are written.
